title: kodrantes #2835
definition:
1) a quadrans (about the fourth part of an "as"); in the NT a coin
    equal to one half the Attic chalcus worth about 3/8 of a cent
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a quadrans (about the fourth part of an "as"); in the NT a coin
    equal to one half the Attic chalcus worth about 3/8 of a cent

    NASB:  quadrans, one-fourth of an as (a Rom. monetary unit):
